headline: Erie Indemnity Has Spent a Century Collecting a Fee. The Market Still Prices It Like an Insurer.
summary: Erie Indemnity earns its income from a contractual fee rather than underwriting risk, yet trades at multiples that treat the two models as interchangeable.
